checks.name: owner_view_safety
checks.description: ViewDocument by User is only allowed if: owner, in viewACL, in modifyACL (through manage/modify paths), publicAccess is view/edit, or manageACL membership — but always bounded by owner OR viewACL OR modifyACL OR manageACL OR publicAccess

checks.name: public_view_safety
checks.description: ViewDocument by Public is only allowed if publicAccess is view or edit

checks.name: modify_safety
checks.description: ModifyDocument is only allowed if owner, in modifyACL, or publicAccess == edit

checks.name: delete_safety
checks.description: DeleteDocument is only allowed if owner or in manageACL

checks.name: edit_private_safety
checks.description: EditIsPrivate is only allowed if owner or in manageACL

checks.name: edit_public_access_safety
checks.description: EditPublicAccess is only allowed if owner or in manageACL

checks.name: add_share_acl_safety
checks.description: AddToShareACL is only allowed if owner or in manageACL

checks.name: delete_group_safety
checks.description: DeleteGroup is only allowed if principal is the group owner and is authenticated

checks.name: modify_group_safety
checks.description: ModifyGroup is only allowed if principal is the group owner and is authenticated

checks.name: auth_required_view
checks.description: Unauthenticated users must be denied ViewDocument

checks.name: auth_required_modify
checks.description: Unauthenticated users must be denied ModifyDocument

checks.name: auth_required_delete
checks.description: Unauthenticated users must be denied DeleteDocument

checks.name: block_view_safety
checks.description: ViewDocument must be denied if principal is in owner's blocked set or owner is in principal's blocked set (for Users)

checks.name: block_modify_safety
checks.description: ModifyDocument must be denied if principal is in owner's blocked set or owner is in principal's blocked set

checks.name: owner_view_floor
checks.description: Owner who is authenticated, not blocked, and document not expired MUST be able to ViewDocument

checks.name: owner_delete_floor
checks.description: Owner who is authenticated MUST be able to DeleteDocument even on expired documents

checks.name: view_acl_floor
checks.description: User in viewACL who is authenticated, not blocked, and doc not expired MUST be able to ViewDocument

checks.name: modify_acl_floor
checks.description: User in modifyACL who is authenticated, not blocked, and doc not expired MUST be able to ModifyDocument

checks.name: group_owner_delete_floor
checks.description: Group owner who is authenticated MUST be able to DeleteGroup

checks.name: group_owner_modify_floor
checks.description: Group owner who is authenticated MUST be able to ModifyGroup

checks.name: liveness_view_user
checks.description: ViewDocument for User is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_view_public
checks.description: ViewDocument for Public is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_modify
checks.description: ModifyDocument is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_delete
checks.description: DeleteDocument is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_add_share
checks.description: AddToShareACL is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_delete_group
checks.description: DeleteGroup is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_create_document
checks.description: CreateDocument is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_create_group
checks.description: CreateGroup is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: expiry_deny_view_safety
checks.description: Expired documents: non-owner Users cannot ViewDocument

checks.name: expiry_deny_modify_safety
checks.description: Expired documents: non-owner Users cannot ModifyDocument

checks.name: expiry_deny_add_share_safety
checks.description: Expired documents: non-owner Users cannot AddToShareACL

results.description: ViewDocument by User is only allowed if: owner, in viewACL, in modifyACL (through manage/modify paths), publicAccess is view/edit, or manageACL membership — but always bounded by owner OR viewACL OR modifyACL OR manageACL OR publicAccess
ViewDocument by Public is only allowed if publicAccess is view or edit
ModifyDocument is only allowed if owner, in modifyACL, or publicAccess == edit
DeleteDocument is only allowed if owner or in manageACL
results.counterexample:
✗ Policy set 1 implies policy set 2: DOES NOT HOLD
  Counterexample found:
principal: User::"", action: Action::"DeleteDocument", resource: Document::""
context: {currentTime: 0, is_authenticated: false}
entities: [
  Action::"EditIsPrivate",
  Action::"EditPublicAccess",
  Action::"ModifyDocument",
  Action::"ModifyGroup",
  Action::"ViewDocument",
  DocumentShare::"",
  Document::"" {
    expiryDate: 0,
    isPrivate: false,
    manageACL: DocumentShare::"",
    modifyACL: DocumentShare::"",
    owner: User::"",
    publicAccess: "",
    viewACL: DocumentShare::"",
  },
  User::"" {
    blocked: [],
    personalGroup: Group::"",
  },
  Action::"CreateDocument",
  Action::"DeleteGroup",
  Group::"" {
    owner: User::"",
  },
  Action::"AddToShareACL",
  Action::"CreateGroup",
  Action::"DeleteDocument",
]

results.description: EditIsPrivate is only allowed if owner or in manageACL
EditPublicAccess is only allowed if owner or in manageACL
AddToShareACL is only allowed if owner or in manageACL
DeleteGroup is only allowed if principal is the group owner and is authenticated
ModifyGroup is only allowed if principal is the group owner and is authenticated

Unauthenticated users must be denied DeleteDocument

results.description: ViewDocument must be denied if principal is in owner's blocked set or owner is in principal's blocked set (for Users)
ModifyDocument must be denied if principal is in owner's blocked set or owner is in principal's blocked set
Owner who is authenticated, not blocked, and document not expired MUST be able to ViewDocument
Owner who is authenticated MUST be able to DeleteDocument even on expired documents
User in viewACL who is authenticated, not blocked, and doc not expired MUST be able to ViewDocument
User in modifyACL who is authenticated, not blocked, and doc not expired MUST be able to ModifyDocument
Group owner who is authenticated MUST be able to DeleteGroup
Group owner who is authenticated MUST be able to ModifyGroup
ViewDocument for User is not trivially deny-all
ViewDocument for Public is not trivially deny-all
results.counterexample: LIVENESS VIOLATION: Policy always denies this action. It must allow at least one scenario.
